displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #69: Rebels and Rogues, Part II
synopsis: TRICKS AND TRAPS! The REBELS AND ROGUES epic continues as our heroes deploy their plans to trick their Imperial pursuers... and everything falls apart! CHEWIE and THREEPIO face moral quandaries - and mortal danger - when they learn the uninhabited planet they're supposed to destroy isn't quite so uninhabited. Will the FORCE be with LUKE in a bar fight? And who is DAR CHAMPION... and what does he have to do with Leia's past?
title: Star Wars (2015) #69: Rebels and Rogues, Part II
